name: I'm in Limbo
hints: Limbo! You've died or been sent here. Read the sign.
READ SIGN for a message. DOWN returns you to Tony's office (room 2) to try again.
Death/reset room. DOWN→room 2 (Tony's office, start). Sign has a message. You end up here after fatal encounters.
notes: Limbo/death room. DOWN→room 2 (restart at Tony's office). Sign readable. Players sent here after dying.
